message:
chore(deps): Major dependency refresh across workspace

Comprehensive dependency update bringing all workspace crates to current
stable versions. Updates async runtime, serialization, and testing
dependencies.

- Refresh Cargo.lock with updated dependency tree (+1175 LOC changes)
- Update workspace member manifests (wa, wa-core, fuzz)
- Document all changes in UPGRADE_LOG.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
